# Raúl Álvarez Hinojosa

> AI Architect · AI Solutions Engineer · Head of AI Architecture @ Aircury (Granada, Spain)

## Contact

- **Email:** hola@raul-alvarez.es
- **CV (PDF):** https://raul-alvarez.es/raul_alvarez_cv.pdf
- **Site:** https://raul-alvarez.es
- **About:** https://raul-alvarez.es/sobre-mi
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/raulalvarezhinojosa/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Rauleinstein

## Summary

Head of AI at Aircury: production LLM systems, evals & guardrails, agentic workflows, RAG, and OCR/NLP for EdTech (PowerMark). Former CTO of Custodio Digital (institutional digital-asset custody spin-off). Prior: Chess24, ByBubbly (Oslo), RedEduca internship.

## Selected project stubs (on-site)

- /custodio-digital — Custodio Digital (ES) · /custodio-digital-en (EN)
- /powermark — PowerMark (ES) · /powermark-en (EN)
- /cityhunts — CityHunts (ES) · /cityhunts-en (EN)
- /el-caso-munford — El Caso Munford (ES) · /el-caso-munford-en (EN)

## Stack (high level)

React, TypeScript, Node.js, PHP/Symfony, Python, Vue, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Redis, Scrum.

## Credentials

- C2 English (Trinity College London, 2024)
- Professional Scrum Master (Scrum.org, 2023)

## Education

Telecommunications engineering path — ETSIIT, University of Granada (UGR).
